description_long: This is a modern, boxy house with a predominantly white exterior and large, rectangular windows arranged in an asymmetrical pattern. The structure features multiple interconnected volumes, creating a dynamic and layered appearance. A spacious wooden deck with a circular hot tub and white railing is attached to one side, providing an outdoor relaxation area. The flat roof and clean lines emphasize a minimalist architectural style, while the interior appears to have open-plan spaces with wood flooring. The main entryway is recessed and framed by a simple overhang, with no ornate detailing. The house is designed for urban or suburban settings, offering both privacy and ample natural light.
description: A modern, white, boxy house with large asymmetrical windows, flat roof, and a wooden deck featuring a circular hot tub.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, and the attached deck with a circular hot tub.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid white wall with minimal windows and the layered structure of the house.
description_view_2: Rear angled view focusing on the deck area and hot tub, with multiple window placements visible.
description_view_3: Back view displaying the full width of the deck, hot tub, and extensive window arrangement along the rear facade.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a simple overhang, no steps or decorative columns, and a minimalist door.
